chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 409 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 14.11.2024 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Applicant/complainant, namely Ghulam Mustafa having CNIC No.45302-8292319-9 is present and submits that he has patched up with the accused/private respondents, therefore, does not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI
